name: research-promotion-flow
rules: For research-promotion tasks, stay on the Harness-native path instead of hand-writing .harness/research/promotions/* artifacts.
Create the candidate with `harness research create-candidate`, `harness research candidate create`, or `harness research refine`.
Generate promotion artifacts with `harness research promote` before opening a PR.
Open the PR with `harness research pr`; do not use raw `gh pr create` or ad-hoc git/JSON authoring when the Harness research promotion commands apply.
Once `harness research pr` returns a PR URL for a promotion-artifact-only change, stop and report the URL.
